message:
🌱 Add console-server to .gitignore

Ignore the console-server build artifact (60MB binary).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@ web/node_modules/
 # Build outputs
 web/dist/
 console
+console-server
 *.exe
 
 # Environment and secrets
